tool.measured_command:
export NPROC="${NPROC:-2}"
. .venv/bin/activate
cmake -S . -B build-bc-sccache -G Ninja -DTHEROCK_AMDGPU_FAMILIES=gfx110X-all -DTHEROCK_ENABLE_ALL=OFF -DTHEROCK_ENABLE_PRIM=ON -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache
cmake --build build-bc-sccache --parallel "$NPROC"
setup_commands: . .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
tool.notes: TheRock documents ccache for frequent CMake rebuilds and has current ROCm compiler-cache pain around restaged headers and HIP/sccache integration. This proof intentionally measures the direct CMake compiler-launcher path with BoringCache-backed sccache, not a generic Docker layer build.
